title: [codex] fix: make ElevenLabs and GPT Image 2 paid
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Premium Pollen Perks
gist.blurb: We've updated our model tiers! ElevenLabs audio and GPT Image 2 are now officially part of the Pollen premium lineup, ensuring reliable, high-quality generations for our power users.
gist.summary: ElevenLabs audio models and GPT Image 2 have been integrated into the paid Pollen tier with updated pricing structures to ensure sustainable, reliable access.
gist.impact: Power users can now utilize these premium models through their Pollen credits, ensuring consistent performance for high-end audio and image generation.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot organizing premium items (a glowing audio cassette for ElevenLabs, a shiny framed picture for GPT Image 2) into a special VIP or premium garden section. Nomnom creature happily eating a golden coin (Pollen credit).
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny VIP top hat, placing a glowing audio cassette and a shiny framed picture into a special golden flower bed. The round tan nomnom creature happily munches on a shiny golden coin nearby. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
